title: glenniea unijugata
intro: Glenniea unijugata is a type of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia and New Guinea. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. Glenniea unijugata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
